sn6.12:1.1: Thus have I heard. On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Rājagaha on Mount Vulture Peak not long after Devadatta had left.Then, when the night had advanced, Brahma Sahampati, of stunning beauty, illuminating the entire Mount Vulture Peak, approached the Blessed One, paid homage to him, and stood to one side.sn.i.154Standing to one side, referring to Devadatta, he recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
